meta.content: Amit Kumar, Amitkr26, Portfolio, Blog, Electronics graduate, VLSI, Embedded Systems, RankrSEO, SEO consultant
meta.name: keywords

div.p: Electronics Researcher & Web Developer specializing in VLSI, Embedded Systems, and SEO. Building high-performance solutions at the intersection of hardware and software.
I am Amit Kumar (Amitkr26), an electronics researcher and multi-disciplinary developer. I work across VLSI/Verilog, embedded systems (Arduino/ESP32), and web/SEO (Blogger/WordPress, HTML/CSS/JS).
Through RankrSEO, I help creators and small businesses grow with clean code, fast pages, and practical content strategy. I also build lightweight HTML5/JS games optimized for the Blogger platform.

My research focus includes CoFe thin films on flexible substrates, characterized by advanced techniques such as XRD, AFM, VSM, and FMR. I am passionate about applying scientific principles to create functional real-world devices.

div.div: Specializing in Thin Films, Spintronics & Embedded Systems. Research on CoFe thin films.
Foundations in electronic devices, circuits, instrumentation, and programming.
Providing SEO, web development, and digital content strategy solutions.

div.p: Deposition and characterization of CoFe thin films on flexible substrates using DC sputtering and XRD/AFM analysis.
A retro-style snake game built with HTML5 Canvas and JavaScript. Optimized for both mobile and desktop browsers.
Classic bubble popper game with smooth physics and engaging levels. Integrated into the Blogger ecosystem.
I am available for internships, entry-level roles, and freelance collaborations in electronics and web development. Feel free to reach out!
© Amit Kumar. All rights reserved. Designed for Personal Branding & Portfolio.
